title: Curaleaf Reports Q1 2024 Revenue Of $339M, 48% Gross Margin Amid Strategic Global Expansion
text: Curaleaf reported Q1 2024 revenue of $338.9 million, representing 2% year-over-year growth with a 48% adjusted gross margin. The company achieved adjusted EBITDA of $76.7 million, or 23% of revenue. Net loss was $48.3 million or $0.07 per share. Operating and free cash flow from continuing operations were strong at $46.1 million and $33.1 million, respectively. The company maintained $105 million in cash position at quarter-end. Management emphasized the company's evolution from an MSO to an MCO (multi-country operator) spanning 15 countries. Strategic acquisitions included Northern Green Canada for approximately $16 million and $15 million in debt repurchases at a 7.75% discount. Operationally, Curaleaf opened its first adult-use store in New York's Hudson Valley, bringing total U.S. retail locations to 145. International revenue increased 59% in the first quarter. Management noted the company gained 33 basis points of market share across BDSA-tracked states.
